params.name: Huygens' Pendulum
params.description:
On Dec 3, 1657 AD, the Dutch physicist Huygens integrated the pendulum into the mechanical clock creating the invention of the pendulum clock.
The pendulum clock was created by Dutch physicist Christiaan Huygens, based on isochronism. The swing of the pendulum is influenced by the gravitational force of the Earth and the pulling force of the rope. Its cycle is a factor of the length of the pendulum and the acceleration of gravity.
